details: Go to https://analytics.google.com and create a GA4 property and Web data stream.
Copy the ID like G-FEWPRZQBH9 from Web stream details.
Keep GA Script tags in app/layout.tsx inside <head>.
In Netlify set NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_ID with exact value G-FEWPRZQBH9.
Go to Deploys and trigger a fresh deploy because env vars apply at build time.
Open https://skarademo.netlify.app and browse pages for 1 to 2 minutes.
In GA open Reports > Realtime and confirm active user/events.
In browser DevTools Network verify gtag/js and g/collect requests are present.
When Realtime data appears setup is complete and warning banner will clear later.
